name: Home-to-First Burst
description: Develop home-to-first burst with fast decisions, clean mechanics, and competitive standards.
instructions:
Setup: Cones at bases, coach with ball, one runner active and one on deck.
Cues: Explode first step; Eyes on coach and ball; Touch inside corner; Low slide, fast pop-up
Scoring: +1 clean execution; +1 communication before/through play; +1 game-speed decision; -1 mental repeat mistake
Progression: Walk-through -> Controlled rep -> Competitive rep -> Live situation
equipment: Cones at bases, coach with ball, one runner active and one on deck.
